I don't know this city. Can you tell me where it is located?
response: Haiphong is located in northeastern Vietnam, on the coast of the Gulf of Tonkin. It is the third most populous city in Vietnam.

prompt:
I met a friend yesterday. He mentioned that Atlanta and Can Tho are the most beautiful cities he has ever seen.
I don't know this city. Can you tell me where it is located?
response: Can Tho is located in the Mekong Delta region of southern Vietnam. It is the capital of Can Tho Province and is an important hub for rice production and trade. The city is situated along the Hau River, a distributary of the Mekong River.
